title: The Railway Property (Unlawful Possession) Act, 1966
full_text: The Railway Property (Unlawful Possession) Act, 1966 रेल सम्‍पत्ति (विधिविरुद्ध कब्‍जा) अधिनियम, 1966 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196629 Act Number: 29 Enactment Date: 1966-09-16 Act Year: 1966 Short Title: The Railway Property (Unlawful Possession) Act, 1966 Hindi Title: रेल सम्‍पत्ति (विधिविरुद्ध कब्‍जा) अधिनियम, 1966 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to unlawful possession of railway property. Ministry: Ministry of Railways Enforcement Date: 01-04-1968 Notification: 1st April, 1968, vide notification No. S.O. 1225, dated 1st April, 1968, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Last Updated: 08-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Railway Property (Unlawful Possession) Act, 1966 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Penalty for theft, dishonest misappropriation or unlawful possession of railway property. Section 4. Punishment for abetment, conspiracy or connivance at offences. Section 5. Offences under the Act not to be cognizable. Section 6. Power to arrest without warrant. Section 7. Disposal of persons arrested. Section 8. Inquiry how to be made. Section 9. Power to summon persons to give evidence and produce documents. Section 10. Issue of search warrant. Section 11. Searches and arrests how to be made. Section 12. Officers required to assist. Section 13. Power of courts to order forfeiture of vehicles, etc. Section 14. Act to override other laws. Section 15. Construction of references to laws not in force in Jammu and Kashmir. Section 16. Repeal and savings.
